title: Add /login and /register API endpoints
description: Implement POST /register and POST /login endpoints for authentication. /register creates users with hashed passwords and returns 201 with user object (no passwordHash). /login validates credentials and returns JWT on success or 401 on failure. Requires input validation for email format and password min 8 chars, duplicate email returns 409.
existing_patterns: src/auth/auth-service.ts: AuthService.login() method with PBKDF2 password verification, returns AuthResult with accessToken/refreshToken
src/auth/jwt-service.ts: JwtService.signAccessToken() (15min) and signRefreshToken() (7 days) methods
src/app/api/*/route.ts: Next.js route handler pattern using NextRequest and returning Response
src/collections/Users.ts: User model with email, firstName, lastName, role fields
